query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of assorted candy packages overlapping one another, including a yellow and red Jelly Belly jelly beans bag, a pink Creme Savers strawberry mint candy wrapper, a blue package with cartoon circus characters, and a pink Smarties box at the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of assorted candy packages overlapping one another with an amateur snapshot composition and obstructed cropping at the frame edges. Visible items include a yellow and red Jelly Belly jelly beans bag, a pink Creme Savers strawberry mint candy wrapper, a blue package with cartoon circus characters, and a pink Smarties box cut off at the bottom. The framing has an unplanned, casual energy with packages awkwardly severed by the borders.
